description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine newcase_2, and is implemented by a call to newcase_2. Use this API to initialize a new power flow case. All existing working case data will be lost upon execution of this API. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = newcas(basemva, titl1, titl2)

parameters.name: basemva
parameters.description: New system base mva. valid base mva values range from 1.0 to 10,000.0. (input; 100.0 by default).

parameters.name: titl1
parameters.description: First line of the new case title. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: titl2
parameters.description: Second line of the new case title. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
